pdg_node.statement: (utc1: float, utc2: float) -> tuple[float, float, bool]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Determines which of the two UTC Julian date parts has greater absolute magnitude and promotes both to a common numeric type, placing the larger-magnitude part first (u1) and the smaller part second (u2) to maximize floating-point precision in subsequent arithmetic.

declaration.name: order_utc_parts_by_magnitude
declaration.type_signature: (utc1: float, utc2: float) -> tuple[float, float, bool]
declaration.docstring: Determines which of the two UTC Julian date parts has greater absolute magnitude and promotes both to a common numeric type, placing the larger-magnitude part first (u1) and the smaller part second (u2) to maximize floating-point precision in subsequent arithmetic.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Calls jd2cal on the ordered two-part Julian date to decompose it into calendar fields and extract the sub-day fractional part fd. Also computes z2, the integer-day portion of u2 by subtracting fd, for later reassembly.

declaration.name: extract_fractional_day_and_julian_offset
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Calls jd2cal on the ordered two-part Julian date to decompose it into calendar fields and extract the sub-day fractional part fd. Also computes z2, the integer-day portion of u2 by subtracting fd, for later reassembly.

declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Calls jd2cal on the ordered two-part Julian date to decompose it into calendar fields and extract the sub-day fractional part fd. Also computes z2, the integer-day portion of u2 by subtracting fd, for later reassembly.

pdg_node.statement: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
pdg_node.informal_desc: Queries the leap-seconds table with the Julian date offset from J2000 to obtain the TAI-UTC difference Δt0 applicable at 0h of the current UTC day.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_today
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table with the Julian date offset from J2000 to obtain the TAI-UTC difference Δt0 applicable at 0h of the current UTC day.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_today
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table with the Julian date offset from J2000 to obtain the TAI-UTC difference Δt0 applicable at 0h of the current UTC day.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_today
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table with the Julian date offset from J2000 to obtain the TAI-UTC difference Δt0 applicable at 0h of the current UTC day.

pdg_node.statement: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
pdg_node.informal_desc: Queries the leap-seconds table for the TAI-UTC offset at 0h of the next UTC day (tomorrow) to detect whether a leap-second event occurs between today and tomorrow.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_tomorrow
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table for the TAI-UTC offset at 0h of the next UTC day (tomorrow) to detect whether a leap-second event occurs between today and tomorrow.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_tomorrow
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table for the TAI-UTC offset at 0h of the next UTC day (tomorrow) to detect whether a leap-second event occurs between today and tomorrow.

declaration.name: lookup_leap_second_offset_tomorrow
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, DJ2000: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Queries the leap-seconds table for the TAI-UTC offset at 0h of the next UTC day (tomorrow) to detect whether a leap-second event occurs between today and tomorrow.

pdg_node.statement: (fd: float, delta_t0: float, delta_t24: float) -> float
pdg_node.informal_desc: Detects a leap-second jump by comparing today's and tomorrow's TAI-UTC offsets and distributes any difference uniformly across the preceding day by adjusting the fractional day fd. This smears the leap second into the 86400 seconds of the current day.

declaration.name: spread_leap_second_into_fractional_day
declaration.type_signature: (fd: float, delta_t0: float, delta_t24: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Detects a leap-second jump by comparing today's and tomorrow's TAI-UTC offsets and distributes any difference uniformly across the preceding day by adjusting the fractional day fd. This smears the leap second into the 86400 seconds of the current day.

declaration.name: spread_leap_second_into_fractional_day
declaration.type_signature: (fd: float, delta_t0: float, delta_t24: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Detects a leap-second jump by comparing today's and tomorrow's TAI-UTC offsets and distributes any difference uniformly across the preceding day by adjusting the fractional day fd. This smears the leap second into the 86400 seconds of the current day.

declaration.name: spread_leap_second_into_fractional_day
declaration.type_signature: (fd: float, delta_t0: float, delta_t24: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Detects a leap-second jump by comparing today's and tomorrow's TAI-UTC offsets and distributes any difference uniformly across the preceding day by adjusting the fractional day fd. This smears the leap second into the 86400 seconds of the current day.

pdg_node.statement: (z2: float, fd_adjusted: float, delta_t0: float) -> float
pdg_node.informal_desc: Combines the integer-day component z2, the leap-adjusted fractional day fd_adjusted, and today's leap-second offset delta_t0 (converted to day units) to form the second part of the two-part TAI Julian date a2.

declaration.name: assemble_tai_second_part
declaration.type_signature: (z2: float, fd_adjusted: float, delta_t0: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Combines the integer-day component z2, the leap-adjusted fractional day fd_adjusted, and today's leap-second offset delta_t0 (converted to day units) to form the second part of the two-part TAI Julian date a2.

declaration.name: assemble_tai_second_part
declaration.type_signature: (z2: float, fd_adjusted: float, delta_t0: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Combines the integer-day component z2, the leap-adjusted fractional day fd_adjusted, and today's leap-second offset delta_t0 (converted to day units) to form the second part of the two-part TAI Julian date a2.

declaration.name: assemble_tai_second_part
declaration.type_signature: (z2: float, fd_adjusted: float, delta_t0: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Combines the integer-day component z2, the leap-adjusted fractional day fd_adjusted, and today's leap-second offset delta_t0 (converted to day units) to form the second part of the two-part TAI Julian date a2.

pdg_node.statement: (u1: float, a2: float, big1: bool) -> tuple[float, float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Promotes u1 and a2 to a common type and restores the original caller-specified split order: if the first input utc1 was the larger part (big1=true), tai1=u1 and tai2=a2; otherwise tai1=a2 and tai2=u1.

declaration.name: restore_original_split_order_for_tai
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, a2: float, big1: bool) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Promotes u1 and a2 to a common type and restores the original caller-specified split order: if the first input utc1 was the larger part (big1=true), tai1=u1 and tai2=a2; otherwise tai1=a2 and tai2=u1.

pdg_node.statement: (tai1: float, tai2: float) -> tuple[float, float, bool]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Determines which of the two TAI Julian date parts has greater absolute magnitude and reorders them so the larger part comes first, recording the original ordering for later restoration.

declaration.docstring: Determines which of the two TAI Julian date parts has greater absolute magnitude and reorders them so the larger part comes first, recording the original ordering for later restoration.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Initialises the UTC trial value as a direct copy of the reordered TAI parts, providing a zeroth-order estimate before iterative refinement begins.

declaration.name: seed_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Initialises the UTC trial value as a direct copy of the reordered TAI parts, providing a zeroth-order estimate before iterative refinement begins.

declaration.name: seed_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Initialises the UTC trial value as a direct copy of the reordered TAI parts, providing a zeroth-order estimate before iterative refinement begins.

declaration.name: seed_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Initialises the UTC trial value as a direct copy of the reordered TAI parts, providing a zeroth-order estimate before iterative refinement begins.

pdg_node.statement: (u1: float, u2: float, a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Iteratively refines the UTC estimate by calling utc_to_tai_leap_second_kernel on the current candidate, computing the TAI residual (a1-g1, a2-g2), and applying the correction to u2. Runs for two iterations to converge through any leap-second boundary.

declaration.name: evaluate_and_refine_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Iteratively refines the UTC estimate by calling utc_to_tai_leap_second_kernel on the current candidate, computing the TAI residual (a1-g1, a2-g2), and applying the correction to u2. Runs for two iterations to converge through any leap-second boundary.

declaration.name: evaluate_and_refine_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Iteratively refines the UTC estimate by calling utc_to_tai_leap_second_kernel on the current candidate, computing the TAI residual (a1-g1, a2-g2), and applying the correction to u2. Runs for two iterations to converge through any leap-second boundary.

declaration.name: evaluate_and_refine_utc_estimate
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, a1: float, a2: float) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Iteratively refines the UTC estimate by calling utc_to_tai_leap_second_kernel on the current candidate, computing the TAI residual (a1-g1, a2-g2), and applying the correction to u2. Runs for two iterations to converge through any leap-second boundary.

pdg_node.statement: (u1: float, u2: float, big1: bool) -> tuple[float, float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Restores the UTC result to match the original input ordering of tai1/tai2, swapping u1 and u2 if the smaller TAI part was originally first, and type-promotes the pair for consistent return types.

declaration.name: restore_utc_output_order
declaration.type_signature: (u1: float, u2: float, big1: bool) -> tuple[float, float]
declaration.docstring: Restores the UTC result to match the original input ordering of tai1/tai2, swapping u1 and u2 if the smaller TAI part was originally first, and type-promotes the pair for consistent return types.
